embeds.title: Morimens - V1.7.3.0 Maintenance Notice - Steam News
embeds.description: Dear Keeper, Mythag University will undergo facility maintenance on December 12 from 08:00 to 11:00 (UTC+8). After maintenance, you will need to log in again and update resources. Supplies will be sent via mail. For any questions, please contact the campus customer service center. Thank you for your
